name: bids-validate
description: Validate a proposed BIDS dataset configuration and series mappings

config.description: Reference to the workflow context containing dataset metadata (name, outputDir, license, etc.)

valid.description: Whether the proposed dataset passes all validation checks

errors.description: Validation errors that must be fixed before writing

block.label: Preview Images
block.description: Review images before proceeding to the next step

block.label: Validate BIDS
block.description: Check that the dataset meets BIDS specification requirements
